zh.lifeSummary: Gräfin Edler von Depenau是Graf von Wassel Bernhard von Depenau和Frederuna von Vockenstedt的女兒，於1085年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 爾波格。她和Cuno Von Wassel U. Depenau至少有1個女兒。她去世於1130年在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福藍德可萊斯 韓諾福瓦瑟爾享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Edler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Fritz, Hilde, Horst, Kurt.

variants.name: Edel
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

en.lifeSummary: Gräfin Edler von Depenau was born in 1085, in Burg, Celle, Lower Saxony, Germany as the daughter of Graf von Wassel Bernhard von Depenau and Frederuna von Vockenstedt. She had at least 1 daughter with Cuno Von Wassel U. Depenau. She died in 1130, in Wassel, Hanover, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 45.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Cuno Von Wassel U. Depenau. Elle est décédée en 1130, à Wassel, Landkreis Hannover, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Gräfin Edler von Depenau родилась в 1085 г. в местности бург, ландкрис селл, ниедирсачсен, Германия. Её родителей звали Graf von Wassel Bernhard von Depenau и Frederuna von Vockenstedt. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Cuno Von Wassel U. Depenau. Она умерла в 1130 г. в местности вассел, ландкрис ханновир, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 45 лет.
